message:
fix: close TOCTOU race in Dolt server startup (gt-ppksl)

Add isRunning() re-check in startLocked() and after backoff sleep in
restartWithBackoff() to prevent double-starts when concurrent goroutines
race through the check-then-act window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
